# dots

> This is a bare repo. The structure resembles your `$HOME`

The setup scripts will install and configure a minimal amount of applications, command line tools, and other packages. See [brewfile](https://github.com/nnlychai/dots/blob/main/.config/dots/brewfile) for specifics.


## Usage

One liner to download and run the setup script.

```sh
curl -LJO https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nnlychai/dots/main/.config/dots/setup.sh && ./setup.sh
```

Inspired by [mvllow/dots](https://github.com/mvllow/dots)
